content_body: AWE…some! Thank you for an awesome vision for Family Retreats. We were so amazed at such a beautiful home - the perfect place for my husband, our two daughters and two sons. It was truly worth the 10-hour drive! We were dazzled by the three stories – upstairs was perfect for my husband and I, my oldest daughter and her husband, and my 92 year old grandfather. The bottom level was perfect for my daughter and her husband with the twin beds – perfect! The pool table was enjoyed by all. The kitchen was my stay for breakfast and dinner and thank you for the nice grill – I’ve mastered the same one at home! We found so much peace, love, and excitement here. It allowed us to bond. We enjoyed prayer and Bible Study everyday. We certainly have decided to come back for our next family vacation. I’ve finally fulfilled my fantasy – just the snow was missing and I didn’t get to light the fireplace. Everything I needed to prepare dinner for my family was supplied. Thank you, Gary and Lissa.
title: Awesome Family Retreat
